title: Maintain the workplace
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Maintain the workplace demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare and use tools, equipment and machinery

pcs.text: Collect required materials, tools and equipment according to lists provided and supervisor instructions

evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
